channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Prime Day takes $240 off Roborock’s Saros 20, one of our favorite robovacs
item.description: The best robot vacuums are the ones you barely have to think about, and the Roborock Saros 20 fits that description well. It’s why it’s one of our favorite robovac / mop hybrids, and thanks to Prime Day, you can get it on sale at Amazon and Roborock for $1,359.99 ($240 off), a new low […]

item.title: The Meta Quest 3S is on sale for $297 — which is basically its old price
item.description: The Meta Quest 3S VR headset with 128GB of storage is $296.79 (about $53 off) at Amazon. This is Meta’s entry-level VR headset, which launched back in 2024 for $299.99 before getting a price increase this year to $349.99. So it’s not exactly the most exciting deal, but it’s about as good as you’re likely […]

item.title: The best Prime Day deals we found on our favorite gear
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is on, and it’s happening for the next four days. Prime members can jump into the deals now until the sale officially ends at 3:01AM ET / 12:01AM PT June 27th. Many discounts will remain the same throughout the duration. We’ve been covering Prime Day in-depth since the shopping event debuted over […]

item.title: Best Prime Day Deals on Yoto Players and Accessories
item.description: Between Prime Day deal and the screen-free technology, the Yoto Player is a great gift you can get the kids in your life without any guilt.

item.title: Best Prime Day Streaming Deals I’ve Found (2026): HBO, Paramount Plus
item.description: Prime Day isn’t just about cheap TVs. It's also about cheap stuff to watch on your cheap TV.

item.title: 12 Best Prime Day Apple Deals: iPad, Cases, MacBooks, and More
item.description: Apple deals abound for Amazon Prime Day. We've rounded up the best deals on Apple Watches, iPhones, MacBooks, iPads, and accessories.

item.title: These Amazon Prime Day USB wall charger deals make powering your phone, laptop, and tablet quicker and cheaper than ever
item.description: Power your phone, laptop, tablet, and more for less with these terrific Amazon Prime Day USB wall charger deals.

item.title: HDMI 2.0 vs 2.1: Why You Don't Need the Upgrade for Streaming
item.description: You probably don't need to use the latest HDMI standards or components just for streaming Netflix.

item.title: Prime Day 2026: Live updates on Apple, Samsung, DJI, Kindle, and more Amazon deals
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on AirPods, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.title: Heading away this summer? The rugged SanDisk Extreme Pro portable SSD is cheaper than ever for Amazon Prime Day
item.description: Amazon just knocked more than $30 off the blazing fast 1TB SanDisk Extreme Pro portable SSD with 2000MB/sec. speeds.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is here: We found 55+ deals on Apple, Sony, Ninja, and Lego favorites
item.description: Another Amazon mega sale is now live. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple AirPods.

item.title: Xteink’s tiny e-readers are 20 percent off for Prime Day
item.description: The Xteink X4 and smaller X3 e-readers are discounted to $55.20 (regularly $69) and $63.20 (normally $79), respectively, as part of Amazon’s Prime Day promotions this week. Both e-readers are significantly smaller and more pocketable than any of the Kindle and Kobo models currently available, and feature magnetic mounts so they can be stuck to […]

item.title: How to watch Panama vs Croatia: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Panama vs Croatia for free online and from anywhere as both sides look to bounce back from opening-game defeats at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Cracks in the crypto world? This top data center provider is spending $500 million to turn former cryptomining sites into AI cloud facilities
item.description: AiOnX pays $500 million for major stake in Genesis Digital Assets, a US-based Bitcoin miner, plans to convert sites into AI cloud centers serving hyperscalers.

item.title: Prime Day has some solid deals on Switch 2, PS5, and Xbox games
item.description: There are some some sizable discounts on new and recent hits from the last few years for the Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and the Xbox Series X / S for Prime Day. Most Amazon game deals are physical copies, but every so often there’s a better or equivalent price on digital versions, as well […]

item.title: The Best Apple Watch Is 30 Percent off Right Now (2026)
item.description: Our top Apple Watch recommendation, the Apple Watch Series 11, is 30 percent off—and the lowest price we’ve seen this year.

item.title: The 35+ best Prime Day tech deals, according to a tech editor on a budget
item.description: Mashable's tech editor chose the best Prime Day tech deals of 2026. Get AirPods for $99, Kindles for $85, and save 50% on Bose headphones.

item.title: This may be the only way to beat potentially high GTA 6 prices once pre-orders are live on Thursday
item.description: GTA 6 pre-orders are opening very soon, and now's the last chance to save on PSN gift cards before the demand increases.

item.title: I've been saying this for months, but I think the Garmin Venu 4 is the best Garmin for most people — especially at this price point
item.description: The Garmin Venu 4 is a fantastic smartwatch, and it just hit a lowest-ever price on Amazon for the Prime Day sales.

item.title: After betting the firm on Anthropic, Menlo Ventures raises victorious $3B fund
item.description: Menlo has created a solid rep for itself as an AI investor, all based on one gutsy $750 million move in 2024.

item.title: This Prime Day Neck Fan Deal Will Save You From Summer Sweats (2026)
item.description: This lightweight neck fan is one of my favorite summer gadgets, and it’s more than 30 percent off right now.

item.title: Walmart, 7-Eleven, Albertsons, and BP used AI to raise gas prices, lawsuit alleges
item.description: A California class action suit claims a slew of gas stations, convenience stores, and big box retailers violated antitrust and algorithmic price fixing rules. BP, 7-Eleven, and Walmart are among a slew of gas stations, convenience stores, and big box retailers sued this week for allegedly using artificial intelligence to spike gas prices in California....

item.title: Klue says hackers stole credential from 2022 that led to customer data breaches
item.description: It's unclear why Klue had not revoked the credential after the limited pilot, which hackers then used to breach a system holding keys for accessing customers' data.

item.title: The Prime Day MacBook Deals I Recommend (2026)
item.description: Apple has warned about MacBook prices rising, making these Prime Day deals even more worthwhile to consider.

item.title: Corsair’s weird Xeneon Edge 14.5-inch touchscreen is sold out at Best Buy – but it’s still available and $50 off from Corsair itself
item.description: The Corsair Xeneon Edge is a unique 14.5-inch touchscreen you can hook up to your gaming PC or laptop for extra control - and it's $50 off for Prime Day.

item.title: Our favorite kitchen gadgets are on sale for Prime Day: Shop Ninja Slushi, Breville espresso machines, air fryers
item.description: Our shopping team found the best Prime Day kitchen deals of 2026. Save up to 43% on the Ninja Slushi, KitchenAid stand mixers, and air fryers.

item.title: I collect 4K Blu-ray so I've picked 6 discs from my personal collection that I recommend to show what the format can really do
item.description: I test 4K Blu-ray for a living, so I thought I'd pick 6 discs that I personally own to recommend for anyone looking to start their own.

item.title: Prime Day has served up several great deals on 4K TVs
item.description: There are three times of year that are best for buying a new TV: leading up to the Super Bowl, Black Friday, and of course now, during Amazon Prime Day. Many of the new 2026 models have been released, and while some will be seeing discounts, the majority of the best deals are going to […]

item.title: Bed Bath & Beyond’s comeback expands as 22 new stores open across the U.S.
item.description: Bed Bath & Beyond has launched 22 new combo stores with The Container Store, giving shoppers a new way to browse the brand in person. We haven’t seen the last of Bed Bath & Beyond just yet.

item.title: Meta hits pause on tracking employee keystrokes to train AI after internal leak
item.description: The company said it was investigating the incident after a screenshot obtained by Business Insider showed that employees’ data was exposed. Just two months after Meta announced plans to track employee keystrokes and mouse movements to train its AI models, the company said it would pause the program after an alleged internal leak.

item.title: The best cordless power tool deals on Prime Day: Save on Craftsman, DeWalt, Hoto, and more
item.description: Save on cordless power tools at Amazon from Craftsman, DeWalt, Hoto, and more during Prime Day.

item.title: Look out Nvidia — Alibaba reveals its most powerful AI models for robots as it looks to strike ahead in agentic race
item.description: Alibaba is looking to expand into the physical world by launching its first suite of AI models for robots amid a broadening global AI race.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg wants Meta to launch its own prediction market
item.description: The app would be independent of Meta's other social media offerings, although sources told the NYT that those social sites could direct users to engagement with the app.

item.title: Dialog Claims It Was Hacked. A Misconfigured Website Left Its Members Exposed
item.description: The private events group, cofounded by Peter Thiel, says a “criminal” hacker is behind a breach that exposed members’ personal details. WIRED found no evidence a break-in was needed to access the files.

item.title: Tesla claims driver ‘manually overrode self-driving’ in deadly Texas crash
item.description: Tesla is pushing back on claims that its Full Self-Driving (FSD) system caused a fatal Texas crash, where a speeding Model 3 barreled into a home, killing a 76-year-old woman inside. In a reply on X, Tesla AI head Ashok Elluswamy says the driver "manually overrode self-driving by pressing the accelerator all the way to […]

item.title: Shop the best Nintendo Switch deals for Prime Day 2026
item.description: As of June 23, shop the best Prime Day Nintendo Switch deals at Amazon.

item.title: Six Samsung monitor deals worth considering for your business this Prime Day
item.description: From a $110 compact QHD display to a $854 OLED superwide, there’s a Samsung screen on sale right now for every kind of workspace.

item.title: Adieu Apple Pay ? L’application du Crédit Agricole va remplacer Apple Pay sur iPhone
item.description: Le Crédit Agricole a discrètement lancé sur iPhone une application de paiement sans contact qui se passe totalement d’Apple Pay. Une première pour une banque française, mais avec des limites bien réelles.

item.title: The 13 Best Amazon Prime Day Deals Under $100 in 2026
item.description: Times are hard in 2026. These Amazon Prime Day deals under $100 on earbuds, Kindles, and other tested products should help make life just a little bit easier.

item.title: « La Lune, avant de la conquérir, il faut la comprendre » : l’ESA défend une exploration spatiale plus utile
item.description: La Lune s'impose aujourd'hui comme l'enjeu central d'une nouvelle compétition spatiale mondiale. Mais derrière les annonces enthousiastes et les promesses d'une installation durable, quelle est la réalité ? James David Carpenter, responsable du Bureau des sciences lunaires à l'Agence spatiale...

item.title: Here are the best Prime Day deals on the Verge staff’s favorite stuff
item.description: While there are several thousand products discounted for Prime Day 2026, most of them aren’t what we’d call winners. We’ve already gathered the best Prime Day deals in our main roundup, but we’re dedicating this page to discounts on Verge-favorite items to help you find useful gear, whether it’s tech-adjacent or not. We’re covering Prime […]

item.title: The best Walmart Summer Deals to shop during Prime Day
item.description: Walmart Summer Deals have now kicked off and run until June 28. Save on Apple, gaming, TVs, and more.

item.title: The best Pokémon deals to grab over Prime Day — save over $25 on the Chaos Rising Elite Trainer Box
item.description: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG Chaos Rising ETB on sale for Prime Day, along with plenty of other Prime Day deals on TCG products and games.

item.title: Some of the best kitchen appliances I've tested are massively discounted for Prime Day — here are 37 top picks from Ninja, Cuisinart, De'Longhi and more
item.description: These are the absolute best deals in Amazon's Prime Day sale, including major discounts on household name brands.
